debug_info.goal:
case left
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∃ m, p = 4 * m + 1 → {s | s ^ 2 = -1}.card = 2

failed_attempts:
use p / 4
    intro h
    have h₁ : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [h]; rfl
    obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three.mpr (by rw [h₁]; decide)
    have : {s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1} = {i, -i} := Set.ext fun _ ↦ by
      simp [← hi, sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg]
    rw [this, Set.toFinset_insert, Set.toFinset_singleton, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
    · simp
    · rw [Finset.mem_singleton, neg_eq_self_iff, (by rw [h]; norm_num : (2 : ZMod p) ≠ 0).mul_left_cancel_iff]
      rintro rfl; simp at hi

    have h1 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp]; norm_num
    rcases ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three.2 (by rw [h1]; decide) with ⟨i, hi⟩
    have : {s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1} = {i, -i} := by

    rw [this, Finset.card_pair]

    intro H; cases H with

      rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at h2
      rw [this] at h2; cases h2
    | inr hi0 => rw [hi0, zero_pow two_ne_zero] at hi; cases hi

by_cases hp : p % 4 = 1
    · refine ⟨p / 4, fun _ ↦ ?_⟩
      have : p % 4 ≠ 3 := by rw [hp]; decide
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff.mpr this
      have hne : x ≠ -x := by

refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp => ?_⟩

      have : i = 0 := (mul_eq_zero.mp (by rwa [two_mul, ← eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero])).resolve_left ‹_›

refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp ↦ ?_⟩
    have : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]; rfl
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := by rwa [ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff]
    suffices { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = - 1 } = {x, -x} by
      rw [this, Finset.card_pair]
      intro h
      rw [eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero, ← two_mul] at h
      have : (2 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h2
        rw [ZMod.nat_coe_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h2
        have := Nat.Prime.eq_two_of_dvd_two h.out h2
        rw [this] at hp; norm_num at hp
      rw [mul_eq_zero, or_iff_right this] at h
      rw [h, zero_pow two_pos] at hx
      exact (show (-1 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 by rw [Ne.def, neg_eq_zero]; exact one_ne_zero) hx.symm
    ext y
    simp [sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg, ← hx]

refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp ↦ ?_⟩
    have hp_mod_4 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp, mul_comm, mul_add_mod, mod_self, zero_add, one_mod]
    have : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three.mpr (by rw [hp_mod_4]; decide)
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
    apply Finset.card_eq_two.mpr
    use x, -x
    constructor
    · intro h_eq; rw [eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero, ← two_mul] at h_eq
      have : (2 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by

      have : x = 0 := (mul_eq_zero.mp h_eq).resolve_left this
      rw [this, zero_pow two_ne_zero] at hx; norm_num at hx
    · ext; simp [hx, sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg]

refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp ↦ ?_⟩
    have hp1 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp]; norm_num
    have hp2 : p ≠ 2 := by rw [hp]; norm_num
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three.2 ⟨by rw [hp1]; norm_num, hp2⟩
    rw [Finset.card_eq_two]
    refine ⟨x, -x, ?_, ?_⟩

      rw [neg_eq_self_iff] at h_eq

        exact fun d ↦ hp2 (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq (Fact.out h) Nat.prime_two).1 d

      rw [h_eq, zero_pow two_ne_zero, eq_comm, ← neg_eq_zero] at hx
      exact one_ne_zero hx
    · ext s; simp [← hx, sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg]

refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp ↦ ?_⟩
    have hp1 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp, Nat.add_mod]; simp

      | inr h0 => apply one_ne_zero (α := ZMod p); rw [← neg_eq_iff_eq_neg, ← hx, h0, zero_pow two_ne_zero]
    rw [Finset.card_eq_two]
    refine ⟨x, -x, hne, ?_⟩

    intro hp
    have hp1 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp]; norm_num
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := by
      rwa [ZMod.isSquare_neg_one_iff, hp1]; dec_trivial
    refine Finset.card_eq_two.mpr ⟨x, -x, ?_, ?_⟩

refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp ↦ ?_⟩
    have : p % 4 ≠ 3 := by rw [hp]; norm_num
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff.mpr this
    have hne : x ≠ -x := fun h ↦ one_ne_zero <| by
      rwa [neg_eq_self_iff.mp h, zero_pow two_ne_zero, eq_comm, ← add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg, zero_add] at hx
    rw [show {s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1} = {x, -x} by ext; simp [sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg, ← hx]]

use p / 4
    intro hp
    have : p % 4 ≠ 3 := by rw [hp]; norm_num
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three.mpr this
    rw [num_solutions, ← hx]
    have h_ne : x ≠ -x := by
      intro h
      rw [eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero, ← two_mul] at h
      have : (2 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
        rw [Ne.def, ZMod.ringChar, Nat.Prime.eq_two_iff (Fact.out _)]
        rintro rfl; norm_num at hp
      have : x = 0 := (mul_eq_zero.mp h).resolve_left this
      subst x; simp at hx
    convert Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem (Finset.mem_singleton.not.mpr h_ne)
    ext; simp [sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg]

    intro
    have := h.out.two_le
    linarith
